style_effects: Subtle heat haze rises from Slowpoke's metallic joints, distorting the background like a mirage; glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically through its armor seams, casting sharp reflections on its polished surface. Metallic dust particles drift lazily in the air, catching the cool blue-white light of its aura, which radiates in sharp, geometric pulses around its body. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
